case_title: NORA MERCADO VS. ELISA UY CALICA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY MERCADO, NORA AS TO DEFENDANT CALICA, ELISA UY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2008 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT CALICA, ELISA UY HEARING SET FOR MAR-10-2008 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00). SERVED DEC-12-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALICA, ELISA UY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION BY PLTF THAT JUDGEMENT HAS ALREADY BEEN SATISFIED.
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERCADO, NORA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALICA, ELISA UY $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,030.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT THE $500.00 SERVICE FEE SET FORTH IN THE LOAN AGREEMENT IS USURIOUS AND UNINFORCABLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
